purpose: Detected platform capability contracts. The agent must verify target HarmonyOS/Cangjie APIs or libraries with CangjieSkills/HarmonyOS/Cangjie API docs, HarmonyOS-Examples, platform docs, or package index lookup before direct replacement, fallback, or deferred status. Direct evidence must be callable from the Cangjie target; ArkTS declarations or native headers/libraries alone are discovery evidence until a Cangjie wrapper, FFI, or bridge is verified. cjpm/project-management docs are only dependency configuration evidence after a package/library is chosen.

entries.sourceEvidenceSummary: Detected 26 source artifact(s) with terms: file_ops, mediastore, gallery
requiredTargetCapabilitySearch: HarmonyOS Cangjie media library album query
HarmonyOS media assets photo album Cangjie API
HarmonyOS Examples media library photo picker Cangjie
entries.targetStrategyHint: Use a HarmonyOS media/photo library or picker capability when available; keep repository boundaries so mock data is not the final implementation.
entries.minimumParity: Discover albums/media, filter image/video/GIF, sort, expose metadata needed by viewer/list screens, and report permission or empty-library states.
allowedDeferredReasons: unavailable HarmonyOS media API in current SDK
device/media permission unavailable in test environment

entries.capabilityName: File access, document permissions, and share URIs
entries.sourceEvidenceSummary: Detected 88 source artifact(s) with terms: file_ops, intent_uri, permissions, saf, storage
requiredTargetCapabilitySearch: HarmonyOS Cangjie file picker document access
HarmonyOS Cangjie file share URI permissions
entries.targetStrategyHint: Replace Android SAF/FileProvider with HarmonyOS file picker, sandbox, or sharing APIs behind a FileAccessService boundary.
entries.minimumParity: Copy, move, rename, delete, create folder, collision handling, permission-denied feedback, and stable paths for target UI.
allowedDeferredReasons: cross-app document permission requires device integration

entries.sourceEvidenceSummary: Detected 26 source artifact(s) with terms: image_viewer, zoom, bitmap, exif
requiredTargetCapabilitySearch: HarmonyOS Cangjie image component gestures zoom pan
HarmonyOS ArkUI pinch gesture Cangjie image
entries.targetStrategyHint: Do not port vendored Android PhotoView line-by-line; implement a target ZoomableImage/MediaViewer contract with gesture or fallback controls.
entries.minimumParity: Display current image, previous/next navigation, toolbar visibility, zoom/reset, pan or button fallback, and metadata/details access.
allowedDeferredReasons: EXIF API unavailable in current SDK

entries.sourceEvidenceSummary: Detected 42 source artifact(s) with terms: android_resource, localization, strings.xml, locale
requiredTargetCapabilitySearch: HarmonyOS resource qualifiers locale string JSON Cangjie
entries.targetStrategyHint: Convert Android string resources and locale groups into HarmonyOS resources or a generated resource adapter; avoid hard-coded English for migrated labels.
entries.minimumParity: Preserve base strings, placeholders, plurals/arrays when user-visible, and source locale coverage or documented product-level locale reduction.
allowedDeferredReasons: product decision to ship fewer locales
target resource format lacks equivalent construct

entries.capabilityName: Runtime permissions and protected platform access
entries.sourceEvidenceSummary: Detected 87 source artifact(s) with terms: permissions, permission
entries.targetStrategyHint: Map Android runtime permission flows to HarmonyOS permission APIs, preserving denied/empty/retry states.
entries.minimumParity: Request required permission, handle grant/deny, show user-facing blocked state, and avoid accessing protected APIs before authorization.

entries.capabilityName: Background work, services, receivers, widgets, and notifications
entries.sourceEvidenceSummary: Detected 10 source artifact(s) with terms: notification_widget, notification, remoteviews, platform_component, service, receiver, background_work
entries.targetStrategyHint: Replace Android platform components with HarmonyOS abilities, background tasks, notifications, or documented product-level omissions.
entries.minimumParity: Preserve user-visible background behavior, notification/widget state, scheduling semantics, and lifecycle entry points when in source scope.
allowedDeferredReasons: requires signed device or service configuration
